  • View page source

piec.drivers.emulators.daq_to_awg

Emulator class to allow a DAQ to function as an AWG.

Classes

DaqAsAwg(daq_instance, **kwargs)

Adapter class that wraps a Daq instance and exposes it as an Awg.
